name: IRC_DIMENSION_DEF_VL
query: SELECT B.DIMENSION_ID DIMENSION_ID, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, B.SOURCE_URL_VALUE SOURCE_URL_VALUE, B.SOURCE_MEDIUM_URL_VALUE SOURCE_MEDIUM_URL_VALUE, B.SOURCE_MEDIUM SOURCE_MEDIUM, B.URL_HEADER_REGEX URL_HEADER_REGEX, B.PRIORITY PRIORITY, B.SEQUENCE SEQUENCE, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TL.SOURCE_NAME SOURCE_NAME, TL.SOURCE_DISPLAY_NAME SOURCE_DISPLAY_NAME FROM IRC_DIMENSION_DEF_B B, IRC_DIMENSION_DEF_TL TL WHERE B.DIMENSION_ID = TL.DIMENSION_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
